arts.ttl: Barcelona 1–0 Mallorca: Player Ratings As Olmo Scores, Pedri Shines in La Liga Win
arts.sum: Barcelona won 1–0 vs. Mallorca and are currently seven points clear of Real Madrid in the La Liga title race.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick explains Ansu Fati’s surprise start for Barcelona vs Mallorca
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has provided an insight into the reasoning behind Ansu Fati being afforded a starting berth in the club’s latest outing. The name of wide-man Ansu…
